hamptons_leg.note: Hamptons stops currently run as a SEPARATE leg, ~Sunday, while NYC/NJ go Thursday. The Hamptons day is NOT fixed and may shift week to week. ALWAYS check in with Kendall before splitting out / scheduling the Hamptons leg; do not auto-assume Sunday.

lot_notes: FAIRWAY IS THE TIME-CRITICAL STOP: the 5/28 delivery failed (out of temp at the dock, never hit shelves). Fedele Stella needs fresh product re-delivered BEFORE FRIDAY 6/5 because Cotto is breaking in the Fairway ad this week. The Thursday 6/4 run must land all 4 Fairway doors. Keep Charlie Moore posted (text 845-721-3925).
All product this week ships from the fresh FK run delivered to Edison on 6/1 (currently the only sellable inventory; all prior Edison stock was a total cold-chain loss and is being written off).
Fairway and Last Minute require a 21-day minimum shelf life. The fresh run meets this.
Do not pick or ship any pre-6/1 product. All of it is on hold for disposal.
